title: Publication sidecar
description: Per-entry sidecar (meta/<year>/<citekey>.json). Two optional halves; no other top-level keys. A bare {} is the empty sidecar (treated as both halves empty).

zotero.description: Lossless ZoteroItem overlay: the fields BibTeX can't carry (abstractNote, notes, attachments, collections, relations, leftover extra). The .bib plus this half reconstruct the ZoteroItem. Its internal schema is the Zotero schema; extend it there, not here.

custom.description: Institute report overlay: open/extensible facts that are not Zotero data. Open by design — only the fields below carry a pinned shape; other report keys (status, provenance, review, …) are allowed and unconstrained. Every recognized field is optional; an absent field means unresolved/unchecked and is never fabricated on normalize.

groups.description: Owning PI groups, recorded as PI-table key slugs (e.g. "bethge"). A set: order is not significant and entries are unique. The slug vocabulary is NOT enforced here — the agents own it (same stance as the citekey scheme).

mentions_ai_center.description: Whether the publication's text credits the Tuebingen AI Center. Tri-state by presence: absent = not yet checked; true/false are reviewed outcomes.

member_institutes.description: Founding member institutes represented as stated in the publication (recommended slugs: ellis, mpi-is, uni-tuebingen; vocabulary not enforced). A set. Absent = unchecked; [] = checked, none represented.
